title: Mamplate
description: Schema for Mampok MaMplate container blueprint files.

MamplateProperties.description: All Mamplate fields. Used directly for Mamplate validation (with required fields added via allOf) and referenced from the Mamplan container section for overrides (all fields optional).

toolDisplayname.description: Human-readable display name for this tool (e.g. 'CellXGene'). Falls back to 'tool' if not set.

image.description: Docker image URI for this container.

containertype.description: Whether this is a main container or an init container.

containername.description: Name of the container. Deprecated — this key is scheduled for removal.

ports.description: Port number exposed by the container for web access.

args.description: Arguments passed to the container entrypoint.

name.description: The environment variable name inside the container.

value.description: The literal value of the environment variable.

bucket_overwrite.description: Sync a container directory bidirectionally with the S3 bucket. If s3_subpath is set, only that subdirectory is synced (e.g. 'user_data'); otherwise the entire bucket root is used. On pod start the bucket (or subpath) is downloaded to path_in_container; during runtime rclone bisync keeps them in sync. Mutually exclusive with 'container_data'.

s3_subpath.description: S3 subdirectory to sync instead of the bucket root (e.g. 'user_data').

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits for the container.

volume.description: Volume mount configuration for the container.

mountPath.description: Path inside the container where the volume is mounted.

container_data.description: Configuration for persisting container-generated files to S3 (e.g. annotations, outputs).

paths.description: Container paths to sync to s3://bucket/container_data/ (e.g. '/app/.cellxgene/annotations/'). Must be absolute paths (start with '/').

restore_on_deploy.description: If true, container_data/ from S3 is downloaded back into the container on deploy (round-trip).

sync_interval_seconds.description: How often the sidecar syncs container paths to S3 (in seconds).

sync_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout in seconds Mampok waits for the pre-delete S3 sync. Mampok proceeds with deletion after this timeout even if sync is incomplete.

readinessProbe.description: Kubernetes readiness probe configuration. Kubernetes uses this to determine when the container is ready to accept traffic.

initialDelaySeconds.description: Seconds to wait after container start before probing.

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the probe.

failureThreshold.description: Number of consecutive failures before marking as not ready.

timeoutSeconds.description: Seconds after which the probe times out.

annotation.description: Kubernetes ingress annotations. Any string key-value pairs are allowed.
